ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node (e.g., user, page, group) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the node */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the node is active */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Labels associated with the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edges" (
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edge */,
  "source_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source node */,
  "target_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target node */,
  "edge_type" TEXT /* Type of the edge (e.g., follow, like, comment) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the edge was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the edge was last updated */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the edge */,
  "is_directed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the edge is directed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_target_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_source_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the node was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used to access the node */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the access request */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was last updated */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard (e.g., grid, chart) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard that the widget belongs to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the widget (e.g., chart, table) */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node associated with the widget */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being displayed on the widget */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the widget was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the widget was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
